items.headline: Banks eye three ECB rate hikes this year as former Governor says he sees no stagflation — yet
items.summary: Brokers now expect the ECB to hike interest rates this year as the specter of higher inflation and lower growth piles pressure on central banks to act.

items.headline: ‘Six figures are missing’: My aunt’s attorney took over her bank account. Two random doctors declared her incompetent. How do I fix this?
items.summary: “The attorney found two doctors — one who briefly spoke to her and signed off, and another who never saw her and simply stamped the form.”

items.headline: Gold rebounds, but silver extends losses as oscillating oil prices spark market volatility

items.headline: ‘We’re living the simple life’: I was a fisherman and my wife was a nurse. We retired with $6 million. Here’s how we did it.

items.headline: I’m 30 and want to save $420,000 in 10 years. But I work for the Fed and can’t invest in bank-specific ETFs. What are my options?

items.headline: Oil prices move higher even as U.S. considers lifting sanctions on some Iranian crude

items.headline: Here’s what happens after the S&P 500 breaks under the 200-day moving average following a long run

items.headline: ‘The money is tax-free’: I’m 76 and won $50,000 in a settlement related to cancer from nuclear waste. What should I do with it?
items.summary: “The money is tax-free and does not affect our income, which comes from investments and Social Security.”

items.headline: Macaulay Culkin and Brenda Song buy a new luxury home in L.A. for $10.3 million
items.summary: Not long after they sold their big Toluca Lake estate for $14.24 million, the couple have reportedly snagged a deal on a home in Sherman Oaks, Calif.

items.summary: The fuel-starved Caribbean island is facing its biggest test since the collapse of the Soviet Union under a U.S. oil blockade.

items.summary: Uber plans to invest up to $1.25 billion in Rivian as part of a deal to deploy up to 50,000 robotaxis in several countries through 2031.

items.headline: The Iran war is threatening supply of a little-thought-of resource — helium. What it means for markets
